name: GBT27930IL_OnTxPrepare
title: GBT27930IL_OnTxPrepare
description: This callback function is called from the GBT27930 IL before a parameter group is sent. The signal value can be updated in the callback or sending of the message can be suppressed.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
